notes: v0.3.66: STATIC FIX. v0.3.65's aggressive 5ms watchdog target + PLC ring fills were creating audible clicks every time video keyframes burst on the shared socket. Progressive watchdog now drops max 8 samples per callback (167μs, inaudible). Target back to 10ms for headroom. PLC disabled (created ring spikes for music recovery — better to let the existing 0.95 fade smooth brief gaps).
